# RouteTable Sample

This page is generated from the checked-in sample manifest at `config/samples/core_v1beta1_routetable.yaml`.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Resource | `core/RouteTable` |
| API Version | `core.oracle.com/v1beta1` |
| Source Path | `config/samples/core_v1beta1_routetable.yaml` |

```yaml
#
# Copyright (c) 2021, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
# Licensed under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 as shown at http://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl.
#

#
# Replace the OCI identifiers below before running e2e.
# Update metadata.name and spec.displayName if you want to force a fresh create
# instead of reusing an existing RouteTable with the same display name in the same
# VCN.
#
apiVersion: core.oracle.com/v1beta1
kind: RouteTable
metadata:
  name: routetable-sample
spec:
  compartmentId: ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleuniqueID
  vcnId: ocid1.vcn.oc1..exampleuniqueID
  displayName: "routetable-sample"
  routeRules:
    - destination: 0.0.0.0/0
      destinationType: CIDR_BLOCK
      networkEntityId: ocid1.internetgateway.oc1..exampleuniqueID
      description: "Route internet-bound traffic through an internet gateway"
```
